title: 1 Fragrant Rosa Nina Weibull Pastel Red Climbing English Rose Bare Rooted Bush Plant -Brighten Garden Outdoor Landscape Shrub Border Walkway Hedge
features: The Nina Weibull Climbing Rose is a charming and delicate rose variety with pastel red petals. Its petals are slightly ruffled, adding texture and interest to the blooms.
This climbing rose is perfect for creating a romantic and dreamy garden setting.
Planting Time: Jan - May, Sept - Oct
This Fragrant bare rooted Rose plant is carefully wrapped up in moist dark compost.
